'''Brindy Truchong''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. While in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], she tried to get quick supplies and provide them to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]].
